zh.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster是Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster和Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins的兒子，出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍登加農登加農。他和Gormley Kavanaugh至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1489年6月15日在愛爾蘭武爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: O'Néill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: O'Neall
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: O'Neal
meanings: Irish (Longford, Down): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: O'Niel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.
Irish (Mayo, Tipperary): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .
English: variant of   Neal  .

variants.name: O'Neel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: OR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Enrí
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Henry .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster was born in Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Ireland as the son of Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster and Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Gormley Kavanaugh. He died on 15 June 1489, in Ulster, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster est né à Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Irlande, fils de Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster et Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Gormley Kavanaugh. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1489, à Ulster, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster wurde in Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Irland, als Sohn von Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster und Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins geboren. Er hatte mit Gormley Kavanaugh mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1489 in Ulster, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster è nato il nel Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Irlanda come figlio di Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster e Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Gormley Kavanaugh. Morì il 15 giugno 1489, nel Ulster, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulsterはアイルランドコウントイ トイロンダンガノンダンガノンでOwen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of UlsterとQueen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higginsの息子として生まれた。彼はGormley Kavanaughとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1489年6月15日にアイルランドウルスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster(은)는 아일랜드 카운티 타이론 던건넌 던건넌에서 Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster(와)과 Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Gormley Kavanaugh(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 6월 15일 아일랜드 울스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster nasceu em Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Irlanda filho de Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster e Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Gormley Kavanaugh. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1489, em Ulster, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster родился в местности дунганнон, дунганнон, коунти тироун, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster и Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Gormley Kavanaugh. Он умер 15 июня 1489 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Henry OR Enrí O'Néill King of Ulster nació en Dungannon, Dungannon, County Tyrone, Irlanda como hijo de Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster y Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Gormley Kavanaugh. Murió el 15 de junio de 1489, en Ulster, Irlanda.
